sn23.11:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Sitting to one side, the Venerable Radha said to the Blessed One: "Venerable sir, it is said, ‘Māra, Māra.’ What now, venerable sir, is Māra?"
sn23.11:1.2: Form, Radha, is Māra. Feeling … Perception … Volitional formations … Consciousness is Māra. Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
